title: The Army Mutinies against Tahir / zo6 A Description of Muhammad b. Harun, His Agnomen, the Length of His Reign, and His Age
description: The Army Mutinies against Tahir / zo6 A Description of Muhammad b. Harun, His Agnomen, the Length of His Reign, and His Age. Recorded under the year 196 AH (812–813 CE) in al-Tabari's History, volume 31.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 31
